task_description: Fix all testing bugs (Pomodoro auto-start, invisible timer text, chat scroll, AI toasts, dashboard blank, mic errors, remove Cmd+K) and add Sprint 5 features (calendar event editing with drag-to-reschedule)

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. npm run lint passes with no errors. npm test has 1 pre-existing failure (react-markdown ESM import in jest) unrelated to our changes. All 3 features + review fixes implemented across 8 commits. Semantic review v2 verdict: APPROVED.
